title: deparia septentrionalis
intro: Deparia septentrionalis, also known as Northern Lady Fern or Autumn Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Deparia. It is native to North America and Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as arthritis and eczema. Deparia septentrionalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits, including reduced inflammation and improved skin health.
